svg.title: TrueRender v4 pipeline: phone video to 3D mesh
svg.desc: A vertical flowchart showing six stages: phone video input, frame extraction with sharpness filter, SAM 3 segmentation, canonical frame selection, TripoSR mesh generation, and the final OBJ/GLB output served by a FastAPI app.
svg.text: Phone video to 3D mesh, single-image generation path

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Laplacian sharpness filter pick frames?')
sendPrompt('How does SAM 3 segment the object across frames?')
sendPrompt('How is the canonical frame selected and cropped?')
sendPrompt('How does TripoSR generate a mesh from one image?')
sendPrompt('What does the FastAPI demo serve?')
